summary: COMPARISON: LEFT RED 'Triple redundancy' — 1 BLUE data bit becomes 3 RED sent bits via TransformFromCopy; middle bit flipped to ORANGE; Indicate then majority-vote reveals correct decode. Rate 1/3 ≈ 33%. RIGHT GREEN 'Hamming(7,4)' — 4 BLUE data bits become 7 GREEN sent bits with parity positions highlighted via color nuance; rate 4/7 ≈ 57% with YELLOW SurroundingRectangle winner.
